chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: Now, just like we have a class name, we also have a tag name

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: which means we can select elements using their tag name

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: so this also returns our elements as an HTML collection

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: like, let's suppose we want to select all the paragraph tags

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: or all the list tags, which we will get in the form of HTML collection

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: and if that tag doesn't exist in the document, then we will get an empty collection

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: like if we want to select all the paragraph tags of this page, let's comment this out

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: to select all the paragraph tags of the page, we can write

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: document.getElements by tag name

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: and we can add our paragraph tag in the tag name

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: now when we add the paragraph tag, we have to write the tag name in the HTML

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: we can make it capital or small

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: so we will make it capital or small, it doesn't matter

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: we will get the correct answer in both the cases

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: so what we have is an HTML collection

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: we have two paragraph tags in the collection

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: in the form of an object

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: this is our first object

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: this paragraph which has no id or class

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: this is our second paragraph which has an id of equal to the description

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: we can also manipulate their values individually

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: like we talked about inner text

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: so we can simply write

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: this will be our collection return

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: from this much line and when we access our first index of this collection

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: so we are talking about this paragraph

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: in this paragraph, we can change the inner text property to ABC

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: as soon as we do this and enter

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: so the value of our paragraph will change to ABC

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: so such manipulations are possible

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: but we should not do this permanently

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: directly from the console

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: but basically it is possible to access elements only with tag name

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: but in this index.html

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: we have never used italic tag

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: like we have bold, we have italic tag

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: we have never used it or we have never used span tag

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: so if we write get elements by tag name

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: and we will write span here

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: in that case we will get an empty HTML collection

chunks.title: Selecting Elements by Tag Name
chunks.text: because span tag has never been used in our entire document

text: Now, just like we have a class name, we also have a tag name which means we can select elements using their tag name so this also returns our elements as an HTML collection like, let's suppose we want to select all the paragraph tags or all the list tags, which we will get in the form of HTML collection and if that tag doesn't exist in the document, then we will get an empty collection like if we want to select all the paragraph tags of this page, let's comment this out to select all the paragraph tags of the page, we can write document.getElements by tag name and we can add our paragraph tag in the tag name now when we add the paragraph tag, we have to write the tag name in the HTML we can make it capital or small so we will make it capital or small, it doesn't matter we will get the correct answer in both the cases so what we have is an HTML collection we have two paragraph tags in the collection in the form of an object this is our first object this paragraph which has no id or class this is our second paragraph which has an id of equal to the description we can also manipulate their values individually like we talked about inner text so we can simply write this will be our collection return from this much line and when we access our first index of this collection so we are talking about this paragraph in this paragraph, we can change the inner text property to ABC as soon as we do this and enter so the value of our paragraph will change to ABC so such manipulations are possible but we should not do this permanently directly from the console but basically it is possible to access elements only with tag name but in this index.html we have never used italic tag like we have bold, we have italic tag we have never used it or we have never used span tag so if we write get elements by tag name and we will write span here in that case we will get an empty HTML collection because span tag has never been used in our entire document
